description: Stage artifact contract exists under .agent/stages/mvp.

description: Root wrapper commands exist and safe current commands pass.

Run make build

Update setup docs
Update init/dev contract
Update repo layout docs

description: make init and make dev prove live local PostgreSQL startup and idempotent bootstrap.

Run make dev
Run make init twice

description: Fresh stage_verifier checks the current evidence and writes verdict.

Review verdict.json
Fix concrete gaps if FAIL
